habitat: Humid forest from lowlands to hills; dense wet evergreen temperate rainforest
story: An icon of the skies, the Sri Lanka Blue Magpie (Urocissa ornata) is a species from the Corvidae family. It thrives in Humid forest from lowlands to hills; dense wet evergreen temperate rainforest, where it interacts with its environment in unique ways. With a conservation status of Vulnerable (VU), the Sri Lanka Blue Magpie is a focus for conservationists worldwide. Understanding the needs of the Sri Lanka Blue Magpie helps us better comprehend the challenges facing our planet's wildlife. This poster is a celebration of the Sri Lanka Blue Magpie, a bird that inspires wonder and highlights the critical importance of conservation efforts.
Every poster is crafted to inspire curiosity about our planet's incredible biodiversity.
